🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 20.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 34.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.7m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.desc:
